description: Create a 3D geometric visualization of the cross product of vectors u = (1, 2, -2) and v = (3, 0, 1) in GeoGebra. The visualization must include the cross product vector, the parallelogram spanned by vectors u and v, and a text annotation showing the result or the magnitude/area. Save the project as cross_product_3d.ggb in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
